SQLite amalgamation, vendored for portability (Windows has no system sqlite3).

Version:   3.53.2 (3530200)
Source:    https://www.sqlite.org/2026/sqlite-amalgamation-3530200.zip
SHA3-256:  81142986038e18f96c4a54e1a72562ae17e502a916f2a7701eff43388cbf1a40 (zip)
Files:     sqlite3.c, sqlite3.h, sqlite3ext.h (shell.c not vendored)

Compiled as its own translation unit via src/sqlite/sqlite_amalgamation.c with the
project compile-time options baked in. To update: re-download, re-verify the SHA3,
replace these three files, keep this NOTES current.
